name: Sherried Cheddar Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cheddar cheese and sherry well until combined.
2. Add the sour cream and blend until smooth.
3. Gradually add the chopped jalapeno pepper, hot sauce, and garlic powder.
4. Serve at room temperature.
5. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
6. Suggested dippers: Celery, Carrots, Radishes, Tomatoes, Polish Sausage, Cantaloupe, Crenshaw or Casaba Melon
